---
title: "People"
---

## Data Science Team members

::: {.people-grid}

::: {.person-card}
![](images/people/annelies.png)

### Annelies de Haan

**Data Analyst**

[Read more](people/annelies.qmd)


:::

::: {.person-card}
![](images/people/saara.png)


### Saara Martinmäki

**Data Analyst**

[Read more](people/saara.qmd)


:::

::: {.person-card}
![](images/people/hassan.png)

### Hassan Pazira

**Methodologist and Data Analyst**

[Read more](people/hassan.qmd)

:::

:::
